headline: US rig count down two as prices drop
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was unchanged this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 242 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 289 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is down two from last week at 543 rigs. A year ago, 585 rigs were active. The count shows that 410 rigs sought oil, down one from the previous week, and 125 explored ...
